title: Province Guessr
text:
Interactive Mongolia Map Game
      Province Guessr
      
        Click the correct aimag on the map. Every correct pick grows your streak. A wrong guess
        ends the run and reshuffles all 21 provinces into a fresh sequence.
      
      
        21 aimags
        No repeats in a run
        3D hover map
      
    
    
      Loading province run...
      
        All games
        Back to the launcher.
        Jump back to the game hub or switch over to Mongolia 100.

      0
    
    
      Best streak

      21
    
  

  
    
      
        Target province
        Pick 1 of 21
      
      Loading aimag...
      
        Hover a province to raise it from the map, then click the area you think matches the prompt.
      
      
        
          Drawing Mongolia...
          
          
            
            
            Next province
          
        
      
      
        Restart run
      
    

    
      How it works
      
        Each run shuffles all 21 aimags into a random order.
        The same province never appears twice in a run.
        A wrong click ends the streak and starts a new 21-province order.
        The map stays interactive, with hover lift and feedback coloring.
        Clear all 21 to finish the run and start a new one.
      
      
        Current run

title: Ger Builder
text:
Educational Build Puzzle
      Ger Builder
      
        Learn how a traditional Mongolian ger comes together piece by piece. Pick the next part in the
        correct assembly order, watch it animate into place, and keep going until the dwelling is complete.
      
      
        7 build steps
        Animated assembly
        Try again on mistakes
      
    
    
      Loading build lesson...
      
        All games
        Back to the launcher.
        Return to the game hub or jump into the Mongolia fact and map games.
      
    
  

  
    
      Steps placed
      0 / 7
    
    
      Next step
      Door frame
    
    
      Mistakes
      0
    
    
      Lesson mode
      Educational
    
  

  
    
      
        Assembly lesson
        Step 1 of 7
      
      Which piece comes first when building the ger frame?
      
        Choose the next correct part. Wrong choices do not reset the lesson; they just ask you to try again.
      

      
        
          
            
              
                
                  
                  
                
                
                  
                  
                
                
                  
                  
                
                
                  
                  
                
              

              
              
              

              
                
                  
                  
                  
                  
                  
                    
                    
                  
                
              

              
                
                  
                  
                
              

              
                
                  
                  
                  
                    
                    
                    
                  
                
              

              
                
                  
                    
                    
                    
                    
                    
                    
                    
                    
                  
                
              

              
                
                  
                  
                  
                
              

              
                
                  
                  
                  
                  
                
              

              
                
                  
                  
                  
                  
                
              
            
          

          
            Pick the first piece to begin.
            
              The lesson follows a common frame-first, cover-second sequence described by multiple ger explainers.
            
          
        

        
          
          
            Restart lesson
          
        
      
    

    
      Step details
      
        Current part
        Door frame
        
          The doorway anchors the front of the ger and traditionally faces south or southeast.
        
      

      Research notes
      
        UNESCO describes the ger as a wooden frame covered with felt and canvas, tightened with ropes.
        Magnificent Mongolia lists the core structural pieces as khana, bagana, toono, uni, and khaalga.
        Its assembly description places the lattice wall and door before the center columns, crown, roof poles, and coverings.
        View Mongolia and Mongolian Ways both confirm felt and canvas go on after the wooden framework is lashed together.
      

      
        Sources used
        
          UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage; Magnificent Mongolia; View Mongolia; Mongolian Ways.
        
      
    
  



  
    Lesson complete
    You assembled the ger in order.
    Restart the lesson to practice the sequence again.
    
      Build again
      All games

title: Landmark Guessr
text:
Interactive Mongolia Map Game
      Landmark Guessr
      
        A famous Mongolian landmark appears in the prompt. Click where you think it is on the map.
        Correct clicks keep the streak alive. A miss ends the run and starts a fresh landmark order.
      
      
        11 landmarks
        No repeats in a run
        Map precision
      
    
    
      Loading landmark run...
      
        All games
        Back to the launcher.
        Jump back to the hub or switch over to the province and fact games.
      
    
  

  
    
      Current streak
      0
    
    
      Best streak
      0
    
    
      Run progress
      0 / 11
    
    
      Remaining
      11
    
  

  
    
      
        Target landmark
        Pick 1 of 11
      
      Loading landmark...
      
        Click the map where you think the landmark sits. You do not need to hit the exact pixel, but
        you do need to be close.
      
      
        
          Drawing Mongolia...
          
          
            
            
            Next landmark
          
        
      
      
        Restart run
      
    

    
      How it works
      
        Each run shuffles the landmark deck into a new random order.
        The same landmark never repeats until the run is reset.
        Correct clicks keep the streak and move to the next landmark.
        A wrong click ends the streak and starts a fresh landmark order.
        The map shows both your click and the correct location after each guess.
      
      
        Current run
        Preparing the landmark sequence...
      
    
  



  
    Map Cleared
    You found every landmark in the deck.
    Restart to play another landmark run.
    
      Play another run
      All games

title: Mongolia 100
text:
Daily Mongolia Fact Game
      Mongolia 100
      
        Work through 100 Mongolia facts, keep your streak alive, and clear the full trail
        without seeing the same question twice in one cycle.
      
      
        100 fact cards
        No repeats in a run
        Streak saved locally
      
    
    
      Loading today's trail...
      
        All games
        Browse the game hub and future releases.
        Use the launcher page to jump between live games and upcoming slots.
      
      
        Fact archive
        Browse all 100 facts on a separate page.
        Use the archive if you want to study before or after a streak run.
      
    
  

  
    
      Current streak
      0
    
    
      Best streak
      0
    
    
      Progress this cycle
      0 / 100
    
    
      Cards left
      100
    
  

  
    
      
        Category
        Card 1
      
      Loading question...
      
        Pick the best answer. Correct answers grow your streak. Wrong answers reset the streak,
        but the card still retires so you will not see it again in the same run.
      
      
      
        
        
        Next fact
      
      
        Restart cycle
      
    

    
      How it works
      
        Each cycle uses all 100 fact cards once.
        Cards never repeat inside a cycle, even after a wrong answer.
        Your streak counts only consecutive correct answers.
        Finishing the deck makes you the winner and unlocks a restart prompt.
        A fresh reshuffle starts the next time you restart a completed run.
      
      
        Current run
        Preparing the question trail...
      
    
  

  
    Source Notes
    
      Fact prompts were compiled from general reference material on Mongolia, including
      Britannica, UNESCO listings, the CIA World Factbook, and Mongolia-focused culture and
      travel references. The game presents them as short quiz cards rather than quoted source text.
    
  



  
    Trail Complete
    You cleared all 100 Mongolia facts.
    
      Your current cycle is complete. Restart to reshuffle the deck and play again.
    
    
      Restart trail
      View fact archive
